name: ai-trading-agent
description: Paper-trading research platform for weekly index options strategies on Indian markets

scripts.lint: [ -f ./tools/biome ] && ./tools/biome check . || echo 'biome not installed — run: bash scripts/install-biome.sh'
scripts.lint:fix: [ -f ./tools/biome ] && ./tools/biome check --write . || echo 'biome not installed — run: bash scripts/install-biome.sh'
scripts.format: [ -f ./tools/biome ] && ./tools/biome format --write . || echo 'biome not installed — run: bash scripts/install-biome.sh'
